data.name: Way of Horny: First Touch
data.detailed_description:
Pop the right colors. Keep winning. Unlock the heat.
Way of Horny: First Touch is a quick, addictive bubble-matching puzzle game where every cleared stage gets you closer to 16 steamy Full HD H-scenes—then lets you replay them anytime in Gallery Mode.

Features

  • Color-match bubble gameplay

  • 16 Full HD, high-quality H-scenes

  • Chill music for a smooth, sexy vibe

  • Replay unlocked scenes in Gallery

data.short_description: Pop the right colors. Keep winning. Unlock the heat. Way of Horny: First Touch is a quick, addictive bubble-matching puzzle game where every cleared stage gets you closer to 16 steamy Full HD H-scenes

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0a
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
